metadata.title: Karobari Munafa Account | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Karobari Munafa is a high profit savings account specifically tailored for large Corporate or GoP-controlled entities. It allows customers to earn higher returns on surplus cash balances, has no preset transaction limits and comes with a variety of free packaged benefits.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Karobari Munafa Account Specially Tailored Bank Accounts for Corporate Entities Open a Karobari Munafa Account If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Tailored for large Corporate or GoP-Controlled Entities Meezan Karobari Munafa is a Mudarabah-based Savings Account specifically tailored large Corporate or GoP-controlled entities. Allowing customers to earn Shariah-Compliant (Halal) returns on surplus cash balances, has no transaction limits and comes with a variety of free benefits. Meezan Karobari Munafa Accounts can be opened by businesses including Sole Proprietorships, Partnerships, Limited Companies and High-Net-Worth (HNW) Individuals. Key Features & Benefits Meezan Karobari Munafa Account (KMA)* Minimum investment required to open an account is Rs. 1,000,000/- (1 million) There is no restriction on withdrawals or numbers of transactions Issuance of chequebook in accordance with the Schedule of Charges (SOCs) Free Pay Orders Free Internet Banking Profit will be calculated on daily product basis Profit will be paid on monthly basis Karobari Munafa Account Plus (KMA Plus)** account is Rs. 4,000,000,000/- (4 billion) on monthly basis Higher expected returns (based on profit sharing) *Financial Institutions (FIs), Public Sector Enterprises (PSEs), and Public Limited Companies (PLCs) can open accounts only under the KMA (FIs, PSEs, and PLCs) category, offered as an extension of KMA. **KMA Plus account is not offered to Financial Institutions (FIs) How the Karobari Munafa Account Works Download Fatwa The Karobari Munafa Account works on the principle of Mudarabah under which the customer is an Investor (Rab-ul-Maal), and the Bank is the Manager (Mudarib) of the funds deposited by the customer. The Bank allocates the funds received from the customers to a Deposit pool. Funds in the pool are invested under Islamic modes of finance that include but are not restricted to Murabaha, Sukuk and Ijarah. Profit Sharing Ratio Bank will share 50% of Gross Income as Mudarib Depositor Gross Income as Rab-ul-Maal Weightages for the Month of April 2026 Products Tier Groups Weightage Assigned Karobari Munafa Account Re.1 - 499.99 M 0.45 Karobari Munafa Account 500 M - 999.99 Karobari Munafa Account 1 B - 4.99 B Karobari Munafa Account 5 B & Above 0.45 KMA (For FIs, PSEs and PLCs) - 499.99 M 0.20 PSEs and PLCs) - 999.99 PSEs and PLCs) - 4.99 B PSEs and PLCs) B & Above 0.20 Karobari Munafa Account PES Monthly 0.43 Consolidated Weightages Profit Rates Profit Rates the Month of February 2026 Products Amount Profit - 499.99 M 6.34% - 999.99 - 4.99 B & Above - - 499.99 M 2.52% - 999.99 - 4.99 B & Above - Profit Rates Historical Profit Rates Want to Karobari Munafa Account Download, Print, Fill Form PDF version of our printed Account Opening Form is also available for download. You can print the form, fill your details and submit it along with the required documents at your preferred branch. Download Form Download Account Opening Forms Account Opening Form For Individual, Joint and Sole Proprietorship Accounts For Partnerships, Companies, Trust, Clubs, Societies & Associations Accounts Visit a Branch You may visit any branch of Meezan Bank and our staff will assist you in filling the Account Opening Form and opening your account. Locate a Branch Get Contacted Fill out the form below to be contacted by a Meezan Bank representative. Get Contacted Form submitted successfully Thank you for contacting us! Our representative will call you within 2 working days. Do you have another query? Feel free to re-fill the form and submit it again Get contacted by our representative! the form below and you'll be guided about how you can open your new account. MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today? By using this AI assistant, you acknowledge and agree that... read more Copy link ✓ Thanks for sharing! Find any service AddToAny More…
